detail.description: Brenton Doyle singles on a line drive to center fielder Michael Helman. Braxton Fulford scores.
Brenton Doyle singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Jorge Barrosa.
Brenton Doyle hits a ground-rule double (4) on a line drive to left field. Willi Castro to 3rd.
Brenton Doyle singles on a ground ball to right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr.
Brenton Doyle singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Ramón Laureano.
Brenton Doyle doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Teoscar Hernández. Jordan Beck scores.
Brenton Doyle singles on a bunt ground ball to third baseman Max Muncy. Willi Castro to 3rd. Kyle Karros to 2nd.
Brenton Doyle singles on a soft bunt ground ball to third baseman Isaac Paredes, deflected by pitcher AJ Blubaugh. Troy Johnston to 3rd.
Brenton Doyle singles on a ground ball to left fielder Brandon Marsh.
Brenton Doyle singles on a line drive to left fielder Joey Loperfido.
Brenton Doyle singles on a ground ball to left fielder Joey Loperfido.
Brenton Doyle singles on a fly ball to second baseman Isaac Paredes.
Brenton Doyle singles on a ground ball to left fielder Brice Matthews.
Brenton Doyle singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Manny Machado.
Brenton Doyle singles on a line drive to center fielder Jackson Merrill.
Brenton Doyle homers (1) on a fly ball to center field.
Brenton Doyle singles on a line drive to center fielder Daulton Varsho.
Brenton Doyle doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Addison Barger, deflected by center fielder Nathan Lukes.
Brenton Doyle singles on a sharp ground ball to right fielder Addison Barger. Braxton Fulford to 2nd.
Brenton Doyle singles on a ground ball to left fielder JJ Bleday. Mickey Moniak scores.
Brenton Doyle doubles (3) on a line drive to left fielder JJ Bleday.
Brenton Doyle singles on a ground ball to center fielder Tyrone Taylor.
Brenton Doyle singles on a ground ball to right fielder Ryan O'Hearn.
